title: astragalus gossypinus var. filagineus
intro: Astragalus gossypinus var. filagineus, also known as the cotton bean milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to North America. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are believed to have immunomodulatory, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus gossypinus var. filagineus include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus gossypinus var. filagineus is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
